Who We Are

Craftsmanship
runs in our blood.

Sofa Xpert was founded by Kabir Rizvi with one mission — to give every worn-out, damaged, or tired piece of furniture a second life. Based in Gurugram, we specialise in repairing and restoring sofas, chairs, beds, and recliners right at your doorstep.

From leather repair and spring replacement to full upholstery restoration, every job gets the same care, skill, and honesty that has made Sofa Xpert Gurugram's most trusted name in furniture repair for over 10 years.

— Kabir Rizvi, Founder

Quality GuaranteedPremium materials, lasting builds
On-Time DeliveryWe respect your time, always
Doorstep ServiceWe come to you, hassle-free
Made with PassionEvery stitch tells a story

What We Do

Our Expertise

A complete furniture solution — from crafting something new to breathing life into the old.

01

Sofa Repair

Complete sofa restoration at your home or our workshop. We fix what others can't.

  • General Sofa Repair (At Home)
  • Leather Sofa Repair
  • Sofa Frame Repair
  • Spring & Cushion Replacement
  • Recliner Repair
02

Bed & Chair Repair

Rejuvenate your bed with fresh upholstery, repaired frames, and custom headboards.

  • Bed Upholstery Repair
  • Chair Repair & Dining Chair Upholstery
  • Leather Furniture Repair
03

Upholstery & Fabric

Refresh your furniture's skin with premium fabrics, leathers, and expert fitting.

  • Sofa Upholstery Repair
  • Sofa Cover Change
  • Sofa Fabric Change / Replacement
  • Leather & Fabric Replacement
04

Restoration & Remodelling

Turn aged, damaged pieces into beautiful functional furniture once more.

  • General Repairs
  • Remodelling
  • Full Restoration
  • Wood Staining
05

Custom Sofa Manufacturing

Envision your dream sofa — crafted to your exact taste, dimensions, and comfort.

  • New Sofa Manufacturing
  • Custom Dimensions
  • Material of Your Choice
  • Modern & Luxury Designs
06

Custom Beds & Stools

Handcrafted beds with custom dimensions and puffy stools for every corner of your home.

  • Custom Bed Manufacturing
  • Bespoke Dimensions
  • Custom Puffy Stools
  • Wall Panels & Curtains
